heroHeadline: El Mencho Killed: CJNG Succession Crisis Unfolds
heroSubtitle: Nemesio Oseguera Cervantes eliminated February 22, 2026, in a joint Mexican military operation in Tapalpa, Jalisco, with U.S. intelligence support. CJNG leadership vacuum triggers fragmentation across western Mexico as rival commanders contest succession.
footerNote: Data sourced from SEDENA, SSPC, FGR, DEA, U.S. DOJ, InSight Crime, Crisis Group, Reuters, AP, and major Mexican news outlets. All contested figures noted. Last backfill: March 17, 2026.
